steps.title: Recognize the value of 4c is already given
steps.content: We're given that $4c = 16$ and asked for the value of $4c - 9$. The key insight is that we don't need to solve for $c$ — we already have the value of the expression $4c$, which is 16. We can use this directly in our target expression.

steps.title: Substitute and evaluate
steps.content:
Substitute $4c = 16$ into the expression $4c - 9$:
$$4c - 9 = 16 - 9 = 7$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
